description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and white plaster exterior walls. The structure features large windows, especially along one side, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and includes a paved driveway and parking area, with several trees and shrubs providing landscaping accents. The layout appears open, with visible interior divisions for rooms and a central courtyard or garden space. The main entrance is set back from the street, accessible via a paved path, and is marked by a modest overhang and minimalistic design. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, typical of contemporary residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, brick and white plaster exterior, large windows, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a paved driveway, open layout, and a central courtyard.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with large windows, the driveway, and the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear and side of the house, emphasizing the flat roof, brickwork, and a more private garden area.
description_view_2: This perspective focuses on the back of the house, with a large lawn and dense tree line providing privacy.
description_view_3: This view displays the side elevation with a long stretch of windows and the expansive green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, paved approach, and no prominent decorative elements
